'''Baysden''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]]<ref name="CSWE" /> [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] [[Sergeant/Legends|sergeant]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="JKTCG" /> In [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] search for the [[Droid/Legends|droids]] [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] to [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]].</ref> Baysden was among the [[Desert stormtrooper/Legends|sandtroopers]] brought to the<ref name="JKTCG" /> [[Desert/Legends|desert]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="Tatooine DB">{{DB|location|tatooine|Tatooine}}</ref> [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Alima]]<ref name="JKTCG" /> to search for<ref name="CSWE Alima">{{CSWECite|I|20|Alima, Captain}}</ref> the fugitive [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]]<ref name="ANH">{{Film|IV}}</ref> [[Droid/Legends|droids]] [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]].<ref name="CSWE Alima" /> The droids were wanted for carrying the [[Death Star plans/Legends|stolen plans]] for the Empire's [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]] [[Battle station/Legends|battle station]].<ref name="ANH" /> Baysden, like other sandtrooper leaders brought to Tatooine by Alima, was a seasoned veteran. He wore full [[Stormtrooper armor/Legends|stormtrooper armor]], and wielded a [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifle]].<ref name="JKTCG" />

==Behind the scenes==
Baysden was mentioned on a card for the [[2001]] [[Scum and Villainy (Jedi Knights TCG)|''Scum and Villainy'']] expansion set of [[Decipher]]'s ''[[Jedi Knights Trading Card Game]]''.<ref name="JKTCG" />
